title: GitHub Actions Workflow
description: Represents a GitHub Actions workflow as returned by the REST API.

node_id.description: The GraphQL node ID of the workflow.

path.description: The path of the workflow file relative to the root of the repository.

state.description: The current state of the workflow.

created_at.description: The date and time the workflow was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the workflow was last updated.

url.description: The API URL of the workflow.

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the workflow on GitHub.

badge_url.description: The URL of the workflow badge image.
